title: Plastic Surgery
overview: A doctor on her last day before maternity leave is thrown into a world of chaos when a hidden threat emerges.

title: Kalari Kid – She Hits Back
overview: In a society marked by gendered violence, nine-year-old Arushi and Milena, twenty-one, reclaim space through Kalari—the world’s oldest martial art. The film follows their fight for self-empowerment and the freedom to be the women they chose to be.

title: The Absence of No
overview: A sexual assault allegation at a university forces those involved and the audience to confront how quickly assumptions and appearances can distort our understanding of the truth.

title: Dovzhenko. First Sight
overview: Ukrainian Odesa, 1926: a city recovering from the war, a city where jazz sounds and cinema is born. Young artist Sashko Dovzhenko seeks freedom in art - and stumbles upon a system that does not forgive dreams. His first film may be his last. And he does not yet know that soon his name will be known to the whole world.

title: Welcome Home
overview: A promotional film about an adventurous summer at Onteora Scout Reservation

title: Clyde Saxophone in: The Lick of Death
overview: The Lick of Death follows Clyde Saxophone in another dastardly case. A new mysterious criminal has emerged and it’s up to Clyde Saxophone to stop them. Does he have what it takes to solve this enigma? Or will he get lost in the sauce?  Laugh, cry, vomit, and piss yourself just a little bit in this breakout classic from award-winning directors Dan Griffiths and Magnus Paulak

title: I Constantly Thank God for Esteban
overview: Home alone on the eve of her First Communion, 12-year-old Carmen receives an unexpected visit from a trio of neighborhood roller girls and scooter boys. While at her home, the kids make Carmen painfully aware of her religious upbringing, ultimately stealing her First Communion dress, culminating in a final showdown at their local roller rink.

title: Across Timing
overview: Rachel, Hadrian, Stormi, and Julian are teenagers dealing with their own insecurities, desires, and fears while finding solace in conversations with a friend who watches them from behind a camera. Between spontaneous confessions and heavy silences, each of them reveals fragments of who they are and who they wish to be. But some truths are hard to face, and not all stories follow the path we imagine.

title: Hammer and Nail
overview: Ondřej Blažek, confronts the raw, untold emotions behind the fight. This UFC-inspired documentary takes you deep into the mind of a fighter, where each punch carries the weight of personal sacrifice, triumph, and inner demons. With high-octane energy and cinematic intensity, Coach Ondřej revisits pivotal moments from his career, reflecting on the emotional turmoil and adrenaline that fuel him. Watch as we recreate one of his most defining fights, immersing you in the brutal reality of what it means to fight, not just against your opponent—but against yourself.

title: The Potion
overview: A horror film based on the legendary work of Olga Kobylianska "On Sunday Early I Dug a Potion".

title: Underground
overview: 2060: In a dystopian future, a lonely mother faces an enormous dilemma when she has to choose between protecting her son, persecuted by an oppressive system, and maintaining her own moral principles.

title: Jezebels
overview: Emma, an ambitious writer joins her new friend Lucy at a secret, all-female literary society. What begins as a night of radical intellectual freedom quickly reveals a ruthless test, where Emma must decide how much of herself she's willing to sacrifice to get ahead.

title: Hộ Linh Tráng Sĩ - Bí ẩn mộ vua Đinh
overview: Based on the folklore about the 7 warriors and the mystery of the tomb of Emperor Dinh.

title: More Beautiful Than Death
overview: And death and life she hated equally, And nothing saw, for her despair, But dreadful time, dreadful eternity, No comfort anywhere

title: Have you ever thanked God?
overview: Have You Ever Thanked God is a short reflective film that gently reminds us of the blessings we often overlook.  Through calm visuals and heartfelt narration, the film invites the viewer to pause, breathe, and notice the simple miracles hidden in everyday life.

title: Sacrifice
overview: During a star-studded charity gala brimming with celebrities, billionaires and empty speeches, a movie star in the midst of an existential crisis is taken hostage by a radical warrior and her devoted followers. As the night descends into chaos, both an inward journey and an outward adventure ensue, where the line between performance and belief, salvation and sacrifice, begins to blur.

title: How to Rob a Bank
overview: Smart bank robbers share their heists on social media while evading police.

title: 4 Kids Walk Into a Bank
overview: After losing her mother, Paige's grandfather steps into to become a more responsible guardian. But when a group of criminals show up at their door demanding that Paige's grandpa join them for one last job, she's faced with a decision: let her newly reformed grandpa dip back into his criminal ways, or enlist her three best friends to do the job first.

title: My Best Friend
overview: The film will talk about women redefining their lives at 50, covering topics such as menopause, changing professions and separation.

title: Se Eu Fosse Você 3
overview: Two decades after their last body swap, Cláudio and Helena are living a new phase of their lives alongside their daughter Bia, now an adult and married with Aquiles. Everything seems balanced until an unexpected situation shakes up the family dynamic and puts their relationships to the test. When lightning seems to strike the same place again, the whole family is forced to learn to put themselves in each other's shoes, in a very literal way.

title: Silenced
overview: After #MeToo broke the cultural silence on gender violence, international human rights lawyer Jennifer Robinson fights against the weaponization of defamation laws to silence survivors.

title: Das gewisse Etwas
overview: After a jewelry heist, a father and son are on the run from the police. They find refuge in a coach full of people with disabilities who are on their way to a holiday camp in the Alpine foothills with their carer. Without further ado, they pretend to be a missing fellow passenger and his carer.

title: Il malloppo
overview: Diego Viani is a former robber, well-known in the 1980s for his "unarmed" heists. His best friend is Michele Ragusa, a shabby private investigator scraping by on cases of marital infidelity. Working alongside him is Alex, an unpaid intern—a clumsy "mama’s boy" who dreams of becoming a detective despite having no talent for it.  Everything spirals out of control when Diego’s past resurfaces in the form of Salamandra, an old accomplice. Salamandra accuses him of stealing the loot from their final job: five billion lire in gold bullion that vanished into thin air.  When Salamandra dies under mysterious circumstances, Diego becomes the prime suspect. Commissioner Castrone, fueled by a long-standing personal vendetta, is convinced of his guilt. The only person who believes in Diego’s innocence is Ragusa, who decides to investigate with the help of the unlikely Alex.

title: Мой папа — медведь 2
overview: A grown-up Masha decides to arrange a personal life for her father, Misha, which leads to a fight with her father, who pries into matters that don't concern her. Masha, upset with her father, runs away into the forest and ends up with a little bear cub whose parents were kidnapped by poachers. Masha's adventures begin, during which she realizes how difficult it is to be a parent, and most importantly, how difficult it is to raise children.

title: Doutor Monstro
overview: A stubborn prosecutor is tasked with putting a plastic surgeon in jail who confessed to killing and dismembering a former patient. What should be an easy case ends up becoming one of the most difficult and disturbing jobs of his career. More than presenting incontrovertible proof and evidence, she will have the challenge of making the jurors -and millions of Brazilians- forget the absurd thesis, constructed with the help of the media by a brilliant lawyer, that the defendant is not a cold-blooded killer and cruel, but a peaceful good man, driven crazy by the unhealthy pursuit of an ex-girlfriend.

title: Against The Skin
overview: In a world driven by inherited beliefs, social noise, and quiet despair, a searching mind wrestles with the question of purpose, challenging whether humanity is truly living or simply surviving until it disappears.

title: The Rivals of Amziah King
overview: Deep within the backwoods of rural Oklahoma, charismatic and musically gifted Amziah King herds a bluegrass-playing band of misfits while overseeing the premier honey-making operation in town. When Amziah’s estranged foster daughter unexpectedly returns, Amziah leaps at the possibility to renew connection and create a family business. But the honey game is ruthless, and Amziah’s rivals threaten to destroy everything he has built.

title: Buddy
overview: A brave girl and her friends must escape a kids television show.

title: Bad Apples
overview: A struggling primary school teacher begins to make some questionable decisions after one of her students is injured.

title: The Kidnapping of a President
overview: In October 1930, a group of officers belonging to the Finnish army's top leadership decided, after a night of drinking, to kidnap Finland's retired first president, Ståhlberg. The Finnish people were divided in the aftermath of the civil war, and the political atmosphere was turbulent and tense. However, the kidnapping went wrong right from the start when the incompetent henchmen recruited for the job were forced to take the president's stubborn wife, Ester Ståhlberg, with them.

title: Mayday
overview: When a U.S. Navy pilot on a top-secret mission during the Cold War gets trapped behind enemy lines, his only chance at survival is to form an alliance with an eccentric ex-KGB agent.

title: By Any Means
overview: A volatile partnership between a hardened mafia hitman and a young Black FBI agent are forced into an uneasy alliance to track down those responsible for the killing of civil rights leaders — uncovering a conspiracy that tests the limits of justice, loyalty and survival.

title: P31
overview: A modern adventure and musical adaption of the book of proverbs with focus on proverbs 31 from holy scriptures.

title: Super Nature
overview: We’re invited on a journey across 25 different countries, with people embracing both abundance and loss, to feel a sense of togetherness with our fellow dwellers on earth, human and non-human. Celebrating all we have and reflecting on all we have to lose, Super Nature proposes a new way of seeing.

title: Barbara Forever
overview: An archive-driven exploration of the life, work, and legacy of iconic, pioneering lesbian filmmaker Barbara Hammer.

title: The Incomer
overview: On an Orkney isle, siblings Isla and Sandy hunt birds and talk to mythical beings while fighting off outsiders. Their lives change when Daniel, an awkward official, arrives to relocate them.

title: The Swan and the Bat
overview: Live-action adaptation of Keigo Higashino's novel of the same name.

title: Jessica Frost
overview: Pursued by a ruthless, time-jumping psychopath and his squad of assassins, a young woman plagued by family secrets must journey through the desert and beyond the boundaries of reality to find out who she really is and claim her destiny.

title: SPECIOUS
overview: A scorned student uses AI to spread a rumor about their ex-situationship, leading to unintended consequences.

title: A Sunken Place
overview: A young neurologist discovers a cure for depression, only to be opposed by a giant pharmaceutical corporation determined to destroy her.

title: Mel
overview: A man recounts a dream to his doctor where he pursues a woman who feels hauntingly familiar.

title: Late Night At The Movies
overview: After an Employee goes missing, Kayleigh is called into work on her only day off. She plans on spending the night after hours only to find that something sinister is lurking throughout the Theater - Stalking her.

title: Solitaire
overview: A young woman adjusts to life in a new city, managing remote work, a relationship on thin ice, and single-player tennis.

title: CHAITANYA
overview: The story of Chaitanya, the mystic saint who transformed devotion into a revolution.  The great king Prataparudra learns that God Himself is secretly present in his kingdom. He tries to meet with Him, but he must pass through insurmountable trials to earn His favor.

title: Machiavellian
overview: When a powerful businessman is mysteriously murdered, his estranged son is forced to take over the empire and, determined to uncover the culprit, dives into a web of corporate deceit with his lawyer and a private investigator, only to discover that the greatest manipulation may be his own.

title: Racism In A*t
overview: When an organization that hunts prejudice in art finds its next target, silence is no longer an option.

title: Practical Magic 2
overview: The Owens sisters must confront the dark curse that threatens to unravel their family once and for all.

title: A Woman's Life
overview: Gabrielle, a dedicated surgeon and head of a hospital department, is stretched thin by the weight of responsibility. There is little time left for her private life: a loving husband and a mother who depends on her care. Yet this is the life she wanted, the life she chose. When a novelist comes to observe her at work for a book, her balance begins to shift.

title: The Train
overview: On the final journey of the legendary Majestic Imperator Train de Luxe, Europe’s elite boards for a farewell voyage. Owner Leo Goldberg stages a glamorous on-board show and private auction as the train travels from Vienna to Prague via Budapest, selling the Majestic to the highest bidder. But the train is more than a luxury relic: it is a controlled, mobile platform with secure compartments, limited exits, and near-total anonymity. That makes it irresistible to intelligence agencies. A Russian agent under deep cover, MI6 operatives posing as newlyweds, Chinese agents secretly wiring the train for surveillance, and a former special forces officer traveling with his daughter all converge on board. Behind champagne and polite conversation, a covert war unfolds. As the train speeds through the night, the stakes rise, trust erodes, and escape routes disappear.

title: Well Being
overview: Short film written by Emir Kuliev, directed by Kevin McNally.

title: The Devil at the Door
overview: When an ancient collective fear returns to a small town, a young man must face alone the horrors that lurk in his bedroom.

title: Bunny-Man
overview: A multimillionaire superhero strikes against evil forces in anonymity wearing a rabbit mask. He is driven by the desire to avenge his sister who committed suicide after suffering a violent act, images of which wound up on the internet.

title: The Runner
overview: A high-powered attorney must race through London, following the cryptic commands of a mysterious caller, as she fights against time to save her abducted son.

title: Call My Agent! The Movie
overview: Five years after the series finale, Andréa Martel is now a director on her first film. Things, however, are not running smoothly. When her lead actor drops days before cameras are set to roll, she must get the team back together, rekindling all the old friendships and rivalries.

title: Heart of Light: Eleven Songs for Fiji
overview: After decades abroad, Iona returns to her childhood home on Fiji, sensing that there she might find the answers to many questions she has about civilisation and its discontent.

title: Между нами, девочками
overview: Three friends, Naika, Zhenya, and Alisa, embark on a traditional spa weekend to escape their routine and family roles, but especially their mothers-in-law. Their plans are ruined when Naika's future mother-in-law, Margarita Pavlovna, unexpectedly joins them, and the three friends' escape from reality and everyday life turns into a true test of their friendship. It turns out they all view life differently.

title: KitKatClub: Kinks of Berlin
overview: The story of the legendary Berlin club and its founder, a woman whose life is inextricably interwoven with the bright and dark sides of a hedonistic lifestyle.

title: Night Shift
overview: A night watchman encounters an unspeakable force while working at an abandoned building. His struggle for survival exposes a dark truth, dragging his sibling Kai into the terrifying events.

title: The Apple is Poison
overview: A man finds a mysterious yet threatening note in a bunch of apples.

title: Voice of the Heart
overview: Zheka is a war veteran from a small southern town who fixes cable TV and occasionally raps at local weddings. Returning to civilian life, he is completely alone and sees no prospects for his own future, until he learns that he has an 8-year-old daughter he never knew about.

title: Monica's Gang: The Movie
overview: Plot TBA. Based on the popular comic book series.

title: Overdrive
overview: A driven young racer relentlessly chases his dream of success, pushing through pressure, rivalry, and personal sacrifice, regardless of the consequences.

title: Ratrace
overview: What would you do if you found a bag full of money?

title: Dark Horse
overview: Follows Jair Messias Bolsonaro, a man driven by his political career after disappointment with the direction of his country, in the journey to become the 38th president of Brazil.

title: Jumanji: Open World
overview: Our heroes have escaped the ever-changing jungles of Jumanji before, but this time the game comes to us - as Jumanji breaks free of its console, unleashing its chaos into our world.

title: Sense and Sensibility
overview: Sisters Elinor and Marianne Dashwood must leave their Sussex estate and move in with a distant relative, facing romance and money troubles.

title: Runner
overview: A former soldier is thrown into a brutal race against time when a critical medical delivery makes him the target of a ruthless cartel. With betrayal closing in from every side, he must survive the chase and deliver his cargo before an innocent child runs out of time.

title: The Uprising
overview: During the English Peasants' Revolt in 1381, a farmer becomes a leader of the rebellion against the Crown forces of a then-14-year-old King Richard II.

title: Morten
overview: A coming-of-age tale told in a magical-realism style about a teenage boy, Morten, who feels out of place among his wealthier classmates. While they enjoy expensive school trips, he spends his days in his family’s dilapidated farmhouse, finding solace only in a camera gifted by his grandfather, a lens through which the world seems brighter. When two girls enter his life - Miia, a street artist, and Emilie, a mysterious girl from the marsh - Morten’s world is turned upside down as he struggles to understand both his first stirrings of love and the changing world around him.

title: Blue Baby
overview: A specialist nurse is given responsibility for a baby boy with a serious heart condition in the middle of nurses’ strike. She is left balancing between her own family, the baby boy and her loyalty for nurses’ cause.

title: Sound! Euphonium: The Final Movie, Part 2
overview: The second part of Sound! Euphonium: The Final Movie.

title: Untitled Oasis Documentary
overview: An epic documentary film from BAFTA and Oscar-nominated writer, producer and director Steven Knight, directed by Dylan Southern and Will Lovelace, tells the story of the Oasis reunion the world was waiting for. Featuring unprecedented on stage and backstage footage from the Gallagher brother's sell-out global stadium tour.

title: Low Expectations
overview: A successful young artist's career derails, forcing her back to her hometown. While teaching high school to make ends meet, she navigates depression and rediscovers herself in unexpected ways.

title: Truly Mine
overview: Leila, an 18-year-old girl who is on the brink of adulthood. As the pressure of her family's expectations grows, Leila has to choose between a life laid out for her or freedom, risking everything she loves for a life that's truly hers.

title: AUFTRAG
overview: A scarred survivor struggles between choices that blur dream and reality, each step pulling him deeper into his own downfall.

title: Steamboat Killie
overview: A small town is shaken when a series of brutal murders begins, all linked by one disturbing detail: the killer is dressed in a Mickey Mouse costume. As the body count rises, a group of locals races to uncover who's behind the mask before the killer strikes again.

title: Harbinger
overview: Julia, sole survivor of late serial killer Decker, is lured back to the house she shared with him for a ghost hunting TV show. The crew discover the 'Harbinger' - a fairground fortune telling machine that reveals their fates one by one.

title: Die drei ??? Triplefeature
overview: During an internship on a film set in Romania, the three detectives investigate eerie occurrences at an old castle. They uncover a mystery surrounding a missing child and a mysterious amulet.  The Carpathian Hound:  In Rocky Beach, an art collector's house is supposedly haunted. When a valuable crystal figurine is stolen, the boys must find the thief among the eccentric residents.  Isle of the Dead:  A mysterious phone call leads the trio to the volcanic island of Makatao. There, they clash with the secret society Sphinx, which will stop at nothing to get its hands on an ancient treasure.

title: The Phone Booth
overview: A man is anxiously waiting for a pay phone to ring, while a dark presence is observing close-by.

title: Gina
overview: After spending three years in jail, Juan goes free with the aim of recovering Eva's love. Zoe and Ismael, two ex-partners who he betrayed, will return to cross in his way.

title: Parallel
overview: An eleven-year-old boy discovers a secret project that completely shatters his understanding of reality. He must race to uncover the truth before the forces behind the operation alter his life forever.

title: The Birthday Party
overview: Thomas, Nora and their teenage daughter Ida live on remote marshland. Social contact is limited, as they only have one neighbour, Cristina, an Italian painter. As the two households plan a surprise birthday party for Nora, strange disturbances begin to occur and unease rolls over the marsh.

title: Stella by Starlight
overview: On Stella’s 29th birthday, four days before her band is set to embark on a career-altering tour, she learns that it is canceled. As she scrambles to salvage the tour and rally her bandmates, tensions rise, threatening not just the tour but the band's future.

title: Think Good
overview: In Dubai, Gil meets Jacques. Their love at first sight leads to a hasty marriage which quickly reveals a deep fracture: Gil does not share her husband's devouring faith. Jacques tries to subjugate her to his worldview with a threatening mantra.

title: Rolling Loud
overview: Inspired by a true story, an overprotective father makes the worst parenting decision of his life when he sneaks his 13-year-old son into Rolling Loud, the world’s biggest hip-hop festival, setting off a chaotic adventure with his reckless co-worker and an eccentric festival volunteer as they navigate wild crowds, security, and their own family dynamics.

title: Shaun the Sheep: The Beast of Mossy Bottom
overview: The residents of Mossy Bottom Farm looking forward to Halloween – until the clumsy Farmer trashes the flock’s beloved pumpkin patch! When Shaun turns mad scientist to fix the problem, things rapidly spiral out of control. With the Farmer missing and a wild beast roaming the woods of Mossingham, all the ingredients are in place for a monstrously fun family adventure.

title: Billie
overview: Nina and Angie are best friends and struggle through life together. When Angie's teenage daughter Rahel needs €300 for a school trip, they decide to go to the bank where Nina's husband Marc works to ask him for a small loan. But when Marc harshly rejects their request, Angie loses her temper. Things get out of control—and suddenly the friends are stuck in the bank and mistaken for gangsters.

title: Adam’s Eight
overview: Adam's Eight tells the remarkable true story of Karl Adam — a visionary rowing coach who, in 1950s Germany, brought together a group of underdogs and turned them into champions. Within just three years, his team defied all odds and won Olympic gold in Rome in 1960.

title: 50 First Dates
overview: A remake of the film 50 First Dates (2004)

title: How Ivan Ended Up in a Fairy Tale
overview: The modern boy Ivan Dobrynin does not like Russian fairy tales and does not believe in them. One day, he accidentally gets into a magic chest and finds himself in the world of Russian fairy tales. To return home, Ivan will have to face evil spirits, make friends and accomplish a real feat.

title: Kin
overview: After many years of actively avoiding her family, Mariia finally decides to pay them a visit, seemingly to celebrate her grandmother's jubilee. However, her intentions might not be as wholesome as it seems, as the true nature of her visit lies in the fact that the birthday girl decided to grant Mariia the ownership over her home. Mariia's uncle Grygorii learns of this and decides to engage in a turf war with his niece, hoping that this will result in the latter changing her mind. However, the young entrepeneur is a tougher nut to crack than it initially looks.

title: Is This Life?
overview: A group of young adults, Navigate love, identity, self-destruction while trying to survive their twenties in a world that constanlty makes them feel no enough.

title: Resident Evil
overview: Bryan, a medical courier, is in the process of making a delivery when a sudden outbreak occurs, forcing him to fight for survival.

title: Play House
overview: While renovating a dilapidated house to win back his ex, a young man discovers VHS tapes of an unaired TV show in the basement. But as the show’s dark history surfaces, it seeps into his life, threatening his last chance at reconciliation.

title: Tell Me What You Feel
overview: When an aspiring Polish artist, Patryk, struggles to sell his paintings, he finds himself at Tear Dealer, a unique art project letting people in poverty trade their tears for złoty. Surrounded by sobs and mirrors, however, he is unable to shed a tear. It’s then that he meets Maria, the project’s conceiver and an art therapist from a well-off family. As their romance buds, they swap traumas and art, discovering they may share more than they thought.

title: Star Detective Pretty Cure! The Movie
overview: Movie based on Star Detective PreCure!

title: The Mini Chainsaw Massacre
overview: While driving a forgotten back road, a young couple is forced into a brutal fight for survival against a chainsaw-wielding madman.

title: さとこはいつも
overview: 3 women who share a name try to write their own stories

title: Vibe
overview: Two inseparable friends' ordinary, unassuming lives spiral into an unpredictable, high-energy adventure that pushes their survival instincts and friendship to the limit.

title: Wellness Retreat
overview: A successful business woman seeks out a wellness retreat to improve her sleep. When she finds the location is actually a seedy motel, her exhaustion takes the lead and she chooses to stay the night, despite her better judgment.

title: Jhingedaau 2
overview: Plot to be announced.

title: Hermit
overview: A hermit’s decaying refuge on the edge of civilisation is shattered by his estranged son’s arrival.

title: Cantos Escuros 2: A Madição de Safira
TEENAGERS
overview: Six old friends gather at Megan’s house for a quiet reunion while her parents are away. What begins as a casual night of music, drinks, and nostalgia quickly becomes tense as old memories resurface and the group dynamic begins to fracture. As the night goes on, an unsettling feeling takes hold, turning the familiar setting into something increasingly dangerous.

title: Strange Spirits
overview: In a haunted roadside bar run by the mysterious Ghoulian Madman, a series of twisted horror stories unfold, from cursed video games and alien body snatchers to killer clowns and supernatural nightmares, proving every spirit has a story.

title: Dave the film maker
overview: Dave is an amateur film maker who little bit too much of a Nolan and Tarantino fan. When his start making his first movie with friend and family, his flaws start to destroy his relationship and his film to being any good.

title: LOCKED IN
overview: Artist and young father John finds himself stuck in a room. He attempts to break free but ends up letting go and surrenders himself to the trap. Causing his home life to blur as he becomes a cog in the white-collar machine.

title: Eu, a Kombi e a Garotinha que Encontrei no Meio do Caminho
overview: Marcela decides to hit the road after an encounter with a fortune teller. Along the way, she meets Lia, and the journey takes on new meaning. Amid changing landscapes and encounters, they embark on a path that changes their lives.

title: Heaven in Stone and Glass
overview: On April 15, 2019, the world watched in horror as flames erupted from the rafters of Notre-Dame Cathedral – an event that captivated global audiences and ignited an overwhelming response of loss, awe, and shared cultural grief. Why did the threat to this sacred space resonate so deeply, even among those with no religious affiliation? Bishop Robert Barron returns to France to answer this question, taking the viewer on a cinematic pilgrimage.

title: Forgotten Island
overview: Jo and Raissa find themselves stranded in the mystical world of the forgotten island of Nakali. They discover that their only way home might come at the expense of a lifetime of shared memories.

title: Another Day
overview: Garance is a young actress, but not a star. She manages everything as best she can, valiant, cheerful, a soldier, and she finds in alcohol an unconditional fuel, a source of comfort. Garance changes her life and begins an eight-year journey of moves, work, encounters, parties and anxieties, joys and hardships… An intimate, friendly, and sexual revolution. But she consumes, more and more. Until the very possibility of death…

title: Red Rocks
overview: Two rival gangs of local and visiting teens compete in the dangerous sport of cliff diving one summer.

title: Elephants in the Fog
overview: In a small Nepalese village nestled deep within a forest inhabited by wild elephants, Pirati is the matriarch of a community of transgender women. She longs for a 'normal' life with Master, a mustachioed man she loves. But when one of her girls disappears, she must choose between love and her responsibility to her community.

title: Le Fantôme de l'Opéra
overview: Anastasia, an 18-year-old ballet dancer at the Opéra Garnier, becomes the obsession of a disfigured man living in the opera's underground labyrinth.

title: Little Wallflower
overview: Madeliefs mother can't seem get in contact with her, she’s busy having a dinner party with her friends, but things aren't as they seem.

title: Queen at Sea
overview: As advanced dementia erodes an older woman’s ability to communicate her inner life, her husband and daughter struggle to act in her best interests, navigating love and the fragile boundaries between care, protection and autonomy.

title: Victorian Psycho
overview: In 1858, an eccentric young governess named Winifred Notty arrives at the remote gothic manor known as Ensor House. As Winifred assimilates into life at Ensor House, staff members begin to inexplicably disappear, and the owners of the estate begin to wonder if there is something amiss about their new governess.

title: Charlie Harper
overview: The journey of a young woman, Harper, and a young man, Charlie, as they meet, leave their respective homes, and attempt to build a life together in a new city. As the driven and ambitious Harper works to build a career as a chef, and the brilliant-yet-stuck Charlie struggles to get himself on track, their relationship faces growing challenges.

title: DreamQuil
overview: Set in the not so distant future when poor air quality leads to people living mostly virtual lives. Carol is a dissatisfied career mother, struggling to find connection within her marriage to Gary and her child. With the day to day familiarity of their home and lives feeling increasingly claustrophobic, and worried she could be heading towards divorce, Carol leaps at the chance to get her life back on track by signing up for "DreamQuil", an avant-garde digital wellness retreat. When Carol returns home however, she discovers her family has been living with "Carol 2", a robot the corporation sent designed to help in her absence, and things take a mysterious and sinister turn.

title: POSSESSION: The Darkness Within
overview: Odysseas Zervas, a grieving painter plagued by visions, confronts a sinister figure who mirrors his fears. As reality dissolves, his family seeks help, while a monk races to save him from a spiritual force that claims both sanity and soul.

title: Noise of Time
overview: A biopic about Soviet composer Dmitry Shostakovich.

title: The Ultimate Planet
overview: After an accident, memories of his service on the Ninth Planet flash in the mind of auto mechanic Dima Khrust: amazing landscapes, the base of earthlings, battles with monsters, friends and his beloved girl Polina, whom he once saved... Khrust's colleagues twist their fingers at their temples, because theirs is completely different - ordinary army memories. But when Dima meets Polina in real life, he no longer doubts: someone corrected their memories. Who and why? The truth can only be found out by returning to the dangerous planet.

title: Memórias do Cárcere
overview: Accused of adultery, Ana Augusta Plácido and Camilo Castelo Branco were imprisoned for more than a year in the Porto Prison, she in June 1860, he in October of the same year, after an adventurous escape from justice through the lands of the North.

title: Captain Nevelskoy and the Lands of the Black Dragon
overview: Captain Gennady Nevelskoy, an excellent student at the Naval Academy, because of his talent, instead of conquering distant seas, he is forced to teach marine science to the Tsarevich, watching as other people's dreams replace his own. 14-year-old Nadezhda, a young pupil of the Institute of noble maidens, has not managed to find her place in the capital. In her heart, she knows that her real home is lost somewhere in the lands of the Far East, and she needs to return there. Having met each other, Gennady and Nadezhda embark on a great and dangerous adventure — in search of themselves and their place in the world.

title: Mrs Winkler Leaves the House
overview: In 2030, retired actress Mrs. Winkler lives bitterly and marked by pain. When her daughter Emi accepts a theater offer, a care robot named Pavlovich takes over the care of her mother. Unexpectedly, his knowledge of classical plays seems to reawaken Mrs. Winkler's will to live...

title: Bibi Blocksberg - Die total verhexte Zeitreise
10s Across the Borders
overview: If the world doesn’t accept you and your kind, trailblaze a world that does. Inspired by the Black and  Latinx underground Ballroom culture of New York, Sun, Teddy, and Xyza create Ballroom communities in Southeast Asia as safe havens from homophobia, transphobia, color discrimination and HIV stigma.

title: Antarctic
overview: A brutal crime shocks an isolated Brazilian research station in Antarctica, transforming the enviroment filled with scientists and military personnel into a veritable pressure cooker. The men at the station become suspects, and a female deputy commander takes on the mission of investigating what happened and, with the support of the women at the base, faces silence and violence in her search for justice.

title: Winthrop
overview: A woman puts her life on the line to protect her troubled, enigmatic cousin, Winthrop, who has been targeted and hunted by a powerful supernatural force.

title: Láska
overview: 30-year-old Anna seeks a stable foundation in her relationships but unknowingly repeats the manipulative patterns learned from her mother. When she crosses paths with a terminally ill patient and his devoted wife, Anna experiences a profound love that transforms her life.

title: The Other Side
overview: Since losing her family, a woman is living alone in the wilderness — far away from society, which is dominated by mistrust and fear after the outbreak of a fatal disease. When she is forced to leave this life behind, she not only experiences a boundless freedom, but also remembers the importance of human closeness and the feeling of belonging.

title: Flywheel: Ignition of the Soul
overview: Set in Rio de Janeiro, the new film Flywheel: Ignition of the Soul follows Noah Silva, a smooth-talking, used-car salesman whose "do whatever it takes" approach to business and life begins to unravel at home and at work. After a series of wake-up calls, Noah is forced to confront the cost of his choices. He begins a difficult and deeply personal journey to restore his integrity while trying to win back the hearts of his wife and son.

title: Emil and the Detectives
overview: Emil is spending his summer vacation with his grandmother in Berlin. But on the train there, he is robbed by the ruthless con artist Max Grundeis and a wild adventure begins! Together with his friends Pony, Gustav, Dienstag, Anh, and Jason, Emil sets off in pursuit and embarks on a fast-paced detective hunt across Berlin.

title: HalloWiebe: Overdrive
overview: Wiebe and his team of security guards face their most challenging task yet.

title: Documentary Enzo9000: The History
overview: An intimate documentary exploring the journey of Enzo Lemes Farias, professionally known as Enzo9000. The film traces his path from early content creation in Mauá to becoming a prominent and occasionally controversial figure in the Brazilian indie horror scene. Through narrative sagas of games like Five Nights at Freddy’s and Undertale, the documentary reveals the challenges of early fame, the resilience against digital harassment, and the profound artistic and personal transformation of this young digital filmmaker.

title: Not Every Love Story Ends in Death
overview: Sol falls in love with Lola, a young deaf actress, and they begin a romance. Everything gets complicated when Lola starts living under the same roof as Sol's ex-husband, Miguel. In this curious triangle, they will discover that the death of one love can be the birth of another.

title: Nagi Notes
overview: Yoriko, an artist living in rural Nagi, is haunted by a former love affair she cannot bear to mourn. When Yuri, a recently separated architect, travels from Tokyo to visit her friend and former sister-in-law, both women find themselves at a crossroad, each searching for ways to let go of the past and define their identities. Yuri's brief escape from the city settles into a quiet confrontation of loss and probing for the two women in bucolic Nagi.

title: Heart of the Beast
overview: A former Army Special Forces soldier and his retired combat dog battle for survival after suffering a catastrophic plane crash deep in the unforgiving Alaskan wilderness. The duo must navigate the harsh terrain to return to civilization while battling the elements and their own inner demons.

title: April X
overview: April X is a high octane, near future thriller about twins Bax and April. When April goes missing, Bax searches every dark corner of the post Soviet cityscape trying to find her, ultimately descending into madness.

title: Chiranjeevi Hanuman: The Eternal
overview: An AI-generated film about the Hindu god Hanuman; it will draw from the sacred texts of Indian epic 'Ramayana' and Puranic literature to create what producers describe as an “awe-inspiring, visual odyssey designed to be enjoyed as a shared experience in theaters.”

title: Numb
overview: A boy who no longer speaks, shaped by a tyrannical father and a mother he both resents and loves, grows up on Japan's northern coast. With nowhere to belong, he returns to seek his father and sets his fate in motion.

title: The Blind Ants
overview: In 1935, a storm caused an English ship carrying coal to run aground in Bizkaia. Residents of Algorta gathered to rescue the coal, but Sabas Jauregui ignored their pleas and dragged his children into the storm.

title: Beasts Clawing at Straws
overview: After stumbling upon 100m yen at work, Kanji finds himself involved in a battle royal for the money. Based on the novel by Keisuke Sone

title: Kushti
overview: A touching comedy-drama about a wrestling-loving couple torn by clashing personalities. They can't live together, yet can't stay apart. This story is a humorous, emotional journey of love, struggle, and deep connection.

title: Resan till Piemonte
overview: The film follows four newly retired people who travel to Italy to help Eva sell an olive farm she inherited. But during their sunny stay, new thoughts arise about life, freedom and the dreams they have yet to realize. The trip becomes a chance to reevaluate what really matters when you reach the second half of life.

title: Days Yet Unknown
overview: A road movie in reverse across Europe: Jola Wieczorek traces her family’s past from Poland to the idyllic Salzkammergut. The documentary The Days Yet Unknown is a moving portrait of origin, displacement, and the question of what home truly means.

title: No Limbs No Limits
overview: The powerful true story of world-renowned speaker Nick Vujicic—a man who has defined what it means to live without limits. This film is more than a documentary; it’s a testament to resilience, faith, and the unstoppable human spirit. Born without arms or legs, Nick overcame his disability to live not just independently but a rich, fulfilling life, becoming a model for anyone seeking true happiness.

title: American Flake
overview: A small-town drug dealer avoids grieving the death of his mom by searching for a lost bag of his favorite potato chips.

title: Snared
overview: This documentary exposes the devastating impact of fisheries, specifically by-catch on ocean ecosystems. We will highlight how the ocean can bounce back once left alone and not fished.

title: Uprooted
overview: Just as a couple prepares to welcome their long-awaited child, a devoted couple meets a troubled teen whose wounded heart resists faith. Their paths intertwine in a story of love, healing, and unexpected grace.

title: The Miracle of the Second Chance
overview: Based on a 2022 book by a 12 year old black girl The Miracle of the Second Chance is a soulful drama about family, tradition, and the supernatural bonds that tie us together. The story begins in a vibrant village, where young Kristine learns the heart of her culture from her mother. After mastering the family kitchen and teaching her older sisters the art of cooking rice and beans, Kristine grows into a determined woman.  Her journey leads her from the village to a bustling nail salon, but her life takes a dramatic turn when her father passes away. After stepping up to take over his work, a miracle occurs: he returns to life, forever changing Kristine’s world. Years later, Kristine is a mother to two children, Lightning and Taffeta, and is married to Cled. To honor her roots, she brings her new family back to her hometown to reunite with her parents and sisters. It is a powerful "full circle" journey that ends in the beautiful peace of a normal, happy life.

title: No More Time
overview: A sequel to the short film “Too Much Time”. Plot TBA.

title: Heaven's Office Games
overview: Four carefree bachelors get into a car accident after a night of partying and find themselves in purgatory — a world of endless bureaucracy and chaotic digital reforms. At the Heaven’s Office, they receive their sentence: a direct express train to hell. Using their charm, they convince the purgatory secretary to give them a chance — seven days on Earth to atone for their sins. But once back, they realize they’ve fallen into a trap hidden in the perfectly ironic fine print of heaven.

title: Whispers in the Witch House
overview: Upon moving into the house of a deceased relative, a woman begins to notice peculiar happenings around her.

title: A Man of His Time
overview: September 1940. Henri Marre arrives alone in Vichy as the authoritarian regime settles in. Broke, estranged from his family, and carrying copies of his self-published manifesto Notre Salut (Our Salvation), the 49-year-old is determined to secure what he believes is his rightful place in the new administration. In his writing, Henri sets out his patriotic convictions and his engineer’s methodology: efficiency above all. Claiming he wants to help save France after defeat, he does whatever is required to remain useful, serving the machinery of the new order with increasing skill. But he may be pursuing something more urgent: escape from his own ruin

title: Seppuku: The Sun Goes Down
overview: Kakizaki Yuji’s period film is not like the jidaigeki films we are used to. While it deals with themes of seppuku, duty, and loyalty to one’s masters and the shogun, we see very little in terms of action. Instead, the film focuses on the inner thoughts and struggles of the protagonist—who is ordered to perform a ritual suicide—his wife, and their entire household, all leading up to the final moment.

title: A Girl’s Story
overview: During a book signing in Normandy, Annie Ernaux, 70, revisits her memories of the summer of 1958, when she was 17. That summer, she left her hometown to work as a camp counsellor. At the first party, the head counsellor set out to deflower her. Finding him handsome, she lets him do it, as if against her will... Her body becomes a foreign place for her, an offering to be sacrificed.

title: The Doll
overview: Wealthy merchant Stanislaw Wokulski falls tragically in love with beautiful yet vain Izabela Lecka. His unfulfilled love leads to many foolish decisions sealing his fate.

title: Death Whisperer: Saming the Werebeast
overview: Set in 1968 in Kanchanaburi, Thailand, the story follows Yak, a soldier from the Black Tiger Division, sent on an urgent mission into the forest of Khao Khwang to find Thap, a missing military intelligence officer.

title: Vira-Lata
overview: Odete and her daughters face financial difficulties after the death of her husband, Suelen, the middle daughter, cannot fit into the new routine, Sara, the youngest daughter, believes that the world is going to end.

title: Power Creep
overview: A lonely arcade regular finds fame and belonging through a new VR game that places him atop a global leaderboard—until cracks in the simulation force him to question what winning actually means.

title: Loretta Robinson:An American Dream
overview: Loretta Robinson:An American Dream is a film of hos Loretta Robinson got started,what achievements and records she has shattered and the barriers she broke for all black girls and woman to play The good Witch Of The South she first gained the role in the film The Wonderful Wizard Of Ha's on TMDB for this she has received praise for her performance as the iconic chachter even being called The Next EGOT and being compared to Billie Burke.
